Workflow Automation

Intelligent Workflows
That Run Behind the Scenes

I design multi-step automation workflows that connect your tools, route your leads, and deliver the right message at the right time — without lifting a finger.

01

Trigger-Based Entry

Workflows launch when a form is submitted, a tag is applied, or a pipeline stage changes.

02

Smart Conditions & Branching

If/else logic routes leads down different paths based on their actions or data.

03

Multi-Channel Outreach

Automated emails, SMS, and internal team notifications fire in perfect sequence.

04

Cross-Platform Integrations

Connect GHL, Zapier, n8n, and Make to sync data across your entire tech stack.

05

AI-Powered Logic

Integrate GPT-powered responses and AI lead qualification into your workflows.

Real Work

Actual Automation
Workflows I've Built

Real systems I've designed and deployed — from GoHighLevel CRM automation for real estate campaigns to AI-powered n8n workflows.

🚀 GoHighLevel

Real Estate Lead Capture & Inspection Automation

A full 7-workflow automation system built for a real estate listing campaign (1 Galeen St, Point Lookout). Covers lead qualification, follow-up sequences, inspection booking, no-show handling, post-inspection nurture, EOI submission, and under-offer pipeline management — all fully automated.

Qualification Engine Follow-Up Sequence Inspection Booked No Show Handler Post-Inspection EOI Submitted Under Offer
View Workflow →
🔁 n8n

AI Jobs Scraper + Resume Optimizer (Experimental)

An experimental AI-powered n8n workflow triggered via Slack. It searches for jobs via HTTP API, validates the query, loops through results, and uses an AI Agent with OpenRouter (GPT) to generate optimized job documents — complete with structured output parsing and Slack notifications.

Slack Trigger HTTP Request AI Agent OpenRouter GPT Loop Over Items Structured Output
View Workflow →
🚀 GoHighLevel — Real Estate Lead Automation
🔁 n8n — AI Jobs Scraper + Resume Optimizer
